Incode was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in San Francisco. The platform is positioned around enterprise omnichannel identity — the same verification, authentication, and fraud-prevention stack across branch, web, and mobile. Incode has a notable presence in Latin America, with significant deployments in Mexican and LATAM banking, and has expanded into US financial services.

The approach leans heavy on proprietary computer vision and biometrics. Pricing is enterprise, custom, and not public.
